text.title: AI Feature UX Pattern Library Examples
text.summary: Worked example: UX spec for a content-suggestion feature with publish action.

example.title: Classification
example.code: ui_surface: true (suggestion card in editor) refusal_possible: true (model declines policy-flagged content) irreversible: true (publish button triggers post + notification fanout) => mandate full set

example.title: Mandatory pattern spec
example.code: confidence_indicator: surface: suggestion-card trigger: model.confidence < 0.7 copy: "Low confidence — review before publishing" component: ConfidenceBadge refusal_surface: surface: editor-toast trigger: model returns refusal verdict copy: "I can't generate that — try rephrasing or skip" component: RefusalToast edit_handoff: surface: suggestion-card trigger: always copy: "Edit" button always visible component: SuggestionCard.EditButton why_trail: surface: detail-drawer trigger: user clicks "Why this suggestion?" copy: list of input phrases + model rationale component: WhyTrailDrawer undo_gate: surface: post-publish-banner trigger: published-via-suggestion-flag copy: "Published from AI suggestion — Undo (60s)" component: UndoBanner ttl_seconds: 60
